coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 5-group, 173-node closure.
validation: Eight Blender/VM cases confirm the 21 staggered bit instances, full 60-unit bit height, Y extent, bit visibility switch, and wall-thickness response. Blender's two exact planar booleans create the perforated top lattice; the current solid-only Manifold fallback keeps a simplified outer plate, which is the remaining major parity gap. Offset Scale is a no-op in all supplied Blender cases and is intentionally not exposed.
